---
title: "U.S. Judges"
subtitle: "Interactive D3.js chart embedded as an iframe"
execute: 
  echo: false
  eval: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
engine: knitr
resources: 
  - script.js
  - data.csv
---

```{=html}
<div class="container">
<iframe class="responsive-iframe" src="us-judges.html" scrolling="no" allowtransparency="true"></iframe>
</div>
```

```{css}
.container {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    width: 100%;
    padding-top: 100%;
}

.responsive-iframe {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 80%;
    max-height: 500px !important;
    max-width: 600px !important;
}
```
